top_signals.title: Banking rails are moving past the 'stablecoin winner' narrative: Sygnum
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Latin America Currencies Outpace Peers in Fragile Rebound
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market currencies trimmed losses on Thursday, with Latin American names outperforming peers as falling US Treasury yields helped improve sentiment despite persistent geopolitical concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cyber Force not included in Senate defense policy roadmap
top_signals.summary: An amendment by Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand (D-NY) to the chamber’s fiscal 2027 national defense authorization bill that would have created the digital-focused service was defeated 14-13 when the Senate Armed Services Committee took up the nearly $1.2 trillion legislation behind closed doors this week.
